title: Recurrences
html:
A specific, repeating life-goal Yahir has captured at least four times across the corpus.

Recurrences

  • Origin (earliest captured): 2022 06 14 being then experience that comes from being (Jun 2022) — "get mom house by the river."
  • 2024 10 30 thoughts on my future (Oct 2024) — "I will buy my a relaxing life by a relaxing river."
  • 2025 01 01 project 2025 (Jan 2025) — "buy my mom a house by a beautiful river."
  • Memory — implicit in the "what he most wants" frame.

Why it matters

  • One of the most-repeated specific goals in the corpus — survives multiple year-revisions verbatim. Strong evidence this is load-bearing motivation, not aspirational filler.
  • Pairs with 2025 03 15 than usual recently ("get her home and change... probably not") — Yahir explicitly oscillating between confidence in this goal and grief at how distant it feels.
  • The "river" specificity is significant — both Grants Pass (Rogue River) and Austin's surroundings (Hill Country springs) put rivers near family meaning.

Wikilinks
